pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script executing CREATE USER and GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES at 'localhost'
setup_task.sh explicitly referencing `socioboard`.* in GRANT statement, and export_result.sh querying socioboard.user_details
export_result.sh script passing -pDataViz#2026 to the mysql command for testing authentication

privileged_info_summary: I verified that the task operates on a synthetically injected database user within a local Socioboard installation. The setup scripts dynamically create the target user 'analytics_user' at 'localhost' and grant it excessive privileges on the 'socioboard' database. The export scripts explicitly require the new password to be 'DataViz#2026' to successfully verify authentication and read-only queries.
